title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology Act, 2007. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1. 1st June, 2008, vide notification No. S.O. 1244(E), dated 28th May, 2008, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
